calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-20-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Chip Cox, Esq for Plaintiffs: David and Julie Levine.
Plaintiff's witness: David Levine, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Richard Opler, Cambridge Construction Management LLC and Cambridge Development LLC.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Damages of $128,301.84
Costs and Fees per memo of Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Advanced From Jun-01-05 To Jun-01-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Text Ruling

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar May-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories set #2 is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, as amended by AB 3078, Chapter 171, Statutes of 2004, requires that motions be served and filed at least 16 court days prior to the hearing. As this motion was filed on April 18, 2005, it is untimely. The motion is also untimely served as to defendant Brevik because he resides outside of the State of California. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Mar-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ATTORNEY PETER J. LINN, MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT RICHARD OPLER.
APPEARANCES: Christine A. Huntoon, Esq. (415) 788-1900 of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney.
